nodes.name: 火冠雀
nodes.summary: 火冠雀（Fire-capped tit，学名 Cephalopyrus flammiceps），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括温带森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The fire-capped tit (Cephalopyrus flammiceps) is a small, long, weighing about bird species assigned to the family Paridae, that breeds in the temperate forest bordering the Himalayas to the south, in the Hengduan Shan and Nujiang Shan on the Myanmar-China border, the Micah Shan and Daba Shan on the Northern Sichuan border
